experiments.name: warm-reply-fast-follow
experiments.hypothesis: Replying within 15 minutes to warm X mentions increases inbound clicks vs same-day replies
experiments.next_step: Do 5 warm replies to buyer-relevant mentions today

experiments.name: proof-first-offer-thread
experiments.hypothesis: A proof-first thread with a concrete money number converts better than abstract capability posts
experiments.next_step: Post 1 proof-led thread with a direct CTA

experiments.name: founding-member-dm-loop
experiments.hypothesis: Direct warm DMs to recent engagers will beat public posting for first paid conversions
experiments.next_step: DM top 10 recent engagers with the founding-member offer
